features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Secure authentication using Next-Auth v5 with credentials provider, session management, JWT tokens, and role-based access control (user/admin roles)

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Complete client (customer) management system with CRUD operations, client profiles, balance tracking, visit history, and prescription management

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Product catalog management with stock tracking, pricing (purchase/sale/wholesale), categories, brands, suppliers, and low-stock alerts

features.name: Sales Management
features.description: Comprehensive sales module with invoice generation, payment tracking, multiple payment methods, partial payments, and client-linked sales

features.name: Quotations (Devis)
features.description: Quote management system with conversion to sales, status tracking (pending/approved/rejected/converted), and PDF generation

features.name: Supplier Management
features.description: Supplier database with contact information, purchase order tracking, and supplier-product relationships

features.name: Supplier Orders
features.description: Purchase order management for tracking orders to suppliers, reception status, and payment tracking

features.name: Stock Movements
features.description: Inventory tracking system recording all stock movements (sales, purchases, adjustments, returns) with history

features.name: Prescriptions Management
features.description: Optical prescription management for eyeglasses with detailed eye measurements (sphere, cylinder, axis, addition, PD)

features.name: Contact Lens Prescriptions
features.description: Specialized prescription management for contact lenses with different parameters than eyeglasses

features.name: Lens Orders
features.description: Order management for prescription lenses (progressive, bifocal, unifocal) with supplier tracking and delivery status

features.name: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Business intelligence dashboard with revenue charts, sales statistics, top products, client insights, and KPIs

features.name: Settings Management
features.description: Application configuration for categories, brands, materials, colors, treatments, insurance companies, and banks

features.name: Reminders System
features.description: Smart reminder and notification system with recurring reminders, entity relationships, and multiple notification channels

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Super admin functionality for user management, client account management, subscription plans, and system administration

features.name: Point of Sale (POS)
features.description: Quick sale interface for in-store transactions with product search, cart management, and fast checkout

features.name: Printing & PDF Generation
features.description: Print and PDF generation for invoices, quotations, prescriptions, and other documents with customizable templates

features.name: UI Component Library
features.description: Comprehensive Radix UI-based component library with buttons, dialogs, forms, tables, cards, and custom components

features.name: Navigation & Layout
features.description: Application shell with sidebar navigation, app header, user profile dropdown, and responsive layout

features.name: Database Layer
features.description: Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL schema definitions, relations, and database operations for all entities

features.name: Security & Authorization
features.description: Secure action wrapper, user isolation, role-based access control, and data protection mechanisms
